## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Daniël van der Winden's job search and explore potential opportunities at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Daniël recently left Ghost due to misalignment in design ambitions and is now seeking new opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Daniël prefers a role balancing hands-on design work with strategic thinking, in a company that values design](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [growthx.ai is a rapidly growing AI-native marketing company with potential design leadership opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)

## Topics

### Daniël's Recent Experience at Ghost

  - [Worked at Ghost from late 2023 to mid-2025](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Enjoyed building features and working on brand identity](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Left due to misalignment in design ambitions and thinking](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Appreciated the calm work environment and open-source approach](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Felt the design quality and ambition were lower than desired](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=369.0)

### Daniël's Career Preferences

  - [Seeking a balance between hands-on design work and strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Wants to work with a team that understands and values design](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Prefers remote work but open to hybrid models](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [Targeting compensation above €130k](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Prioritizes work-life balance to pursue side projects (e.g., magazine)](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=698.0)
  - [Interested in editorial design, writing, and journalism-related roles](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)

### growthx.ai Overview and Opportunity

  - [AI-native marketing company founded by Marcel (ex-CMO of Deepgram, Hashicorp)](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)
  - [Rapidly growing: 20-person team, $7M ARR, recent $12M seed round](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Two main teams: Deliver (client-facing) and Build (product development)](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [Potential role: Design Engineer for Client Ops, focusing on client-related projects](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1651.0)
  - [Diverse work including product design, brand design, and marketing materials](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)
  - [Opportunity to lead design for "The Output" publication](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [Remote work with good work-life balance and competitive compensation](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [Requires 4-hour overlap with San Francisco time zone](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniël to consider the growthx.ai opportunity and reflect on the discussion](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Potential follow-up call to dive deeper into the growthx.ai role if interested](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Daniël to continue with planned interviews and job search throughout June](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Daniël to keep an eye out for the launch of "The Output" publication (expected Monday/Tuesday)](https://fathom.video/share/dvZDA7amas5JzG5pr7p29x3sxvWKBsYL?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
